description: Example webhook POST payload delivered by Finlight when a new article is published. Verified using HMAC-SHA256 signature in X-Webhook-Signature header.

payload.title: Federal Reserve Holds Rates Steady, Signals Caution on Future Cuts
payload.summary: The Federal Reserve held interest rates at 5.25%-5.50% and indicated it needs more confidence that inflation is moving toward its 2% target before cutting rates.
payload.content: The Federal Reserve on Friday kept its benchmark interest rate unchanged...
